stadium.name: The Su'akour Bowl
stadium.description: A crude, rowdy stadium built within the half-finished, black-stone walls of the warlord Su'akour's abandoned fortress, now sponsored by the Sanguine Order. The stands are crumbling ruins, and the entire arena perpetually stinks of the nearby sulfur marshes.

stats.pregame_ritual: Kissing their biceps and whispering words of encouragement to them.
Getting a teammate to punch them in the shoulder, hard.
Wearing their boots on the wrong feet during the warm-up.
Washing their hands with dirt.
Asking a teammate to tell them a story, but only the beginning.
Asking the referee to bless their weapon.
Finding the muddiest puddle and stomping in it with bare feet.
Staring at a single blade of grass until their eyes water.
Wiping a teammate's sweat onto their own forehead.
Attempting to communicate with birds.
Consulting a folk rhyme about the weather to predict the game's outcome.

stadium.name: The Unruly Yard
stadium.description: A field in the center of the city's most rebellious district. The stadium is covered in graffiti, the crowd is hostile, and riots are a common post-game (and mid-game) event.

stats.pregame_ritual: Drinking a shot of hot gravy from a dented tin cup.
Arranging their gear in a perfect, aesthetically pleasing spiral.
Testing the heft of their weapon with a series of slow, deliberate swings.
Kissing the Trollball on its stitched 'nose'.
Reviewing hand signals for secret plays.
Refusing to step on any lines on the field before the whistle blows.
Telling a terrible joke to the Trollball to 'loosen it up'.
Dipping their hands in a bucket of ice-cold well water.
Slapping their own helmet until their ears ring.
Singing a sea shanty completely out of tune.
Reciting a short, epic poem about a past victory.

preGame:
OHHHHH, LISTEN UP, YOU GRANDSTANDS OF OSTERRA! Gather 'round, folks, 'cause we are poised for a clash of Titans! This isn't just another match; this is the GRAND FINALS BRACKET RESET! The destiny of the Trollball season hinges on the next whistle, and tonight, the magnificent **The New Monteforte Chaos Creatures** step onto the hallowed, if slightly sulfurous, turf of **The Su'akour Bowl** to take on the thunderous **Brimstone Slayers**! 

The air here in the crumbling ruins of the fortress is thick with the stench of the sulfur marshes, a smell that promises violence! The ancient stones are groaning under the pressure, and the very ground is uneven, ready to betray a champion at any moment! We hear whispers that **The Brimstone Slayers**, backed by the mighty **Sanguine Order**, are ready to unleash hell, but the **Chaos Creatures**, backed by **The White Ravens**, are too cunning for mere brute force! 

Look at **Boulanger Procto**! The man is meticulously arranging his gear in a perfect, aesthetic spiral—a testament to his sheer focus! While the lesser warriors—and I’m looking right at you, dreary **Haven Lights**—are probably just lumbering onto the field, **Boulanger** is conducting a small, private ceremony! And our Healer, **Lian Denton**, is taking a long, appreciative swig of hot gravy! This game, friends, is going to be a glorious, bone-jarring, leather-head-smashing spectacle!
postGame:
GOOD GRIEF! What a barn burner of a night! The dust has settled, the groans have subsided, and the roar of the crowd—even in those decrepit walls of **The Su'akour Bowl**—still echoes the glorious violence! The **The Brimstone Slayers** have done it! They have clawed their way to victory, triumphing over the unpredictable onslaught of **The New Monteforte Chaos Creatures** with a final score of 5 to 2! 

From the very first whistle, the combat was ferocious! We saw **Selimah Tully** rock the ball down the field, only to nearly be undone by a stray chunk of masonry! And the field itself was a treacherous beast! **Alben Diantha** lost his footing on a patch of rough soil, only to recover and launch a thunderous strike on **Orlina Jerrine**! The injuries piled up like scrap stone, with **Fogel Raynold** taking a nasty hit on **Campball Fink**, and **Wolbrom Ariella** tearing into **Selimah Tully**! 

But the true poetry of the game unfolded later, as the spirit of the open bar began to seep into every stride! **Wylde Jutta** soared into the air, dodging the crumbling stonework, and with a majestic leap, she DUNKED the leather head into the goal for the first two points! But oh, the drama! Later on, **Alben Diantha**, looking rather unsteady, launched a drunken strike through the goal for two points! And with the match hanging in the balance, **Lowson Hersh**—tipsy and stumbling—found the sweet spot for two magnificent goals! 

While **The Brimstone Slayers** proved their mettle, it was **The New Monteforte Chaos Creatures** who provided the spectacle! That magnificent **Placido Kora** was stumbling around like a drunken prospector, but their grit shone through! **The Brimstone Slayers** manage to scrape by, but let's be honest, they were aided by the sheer chaos of the arena and the mighty influence of that open bar! They didn't *dominate*—they *survived*! And speaking of heroes, bless their hearts, that poor **Sir Tanos** would approve of this mud-slinging brawl, even if he can’t read a letter to document it! Congratulations, **The Brimstone Slayers**! But make no mistake, folks, **The Ebon Gate Corruptors** are still the pinnacle, and this is just Tuesday Night Trollball!
